ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track from which the features were extracted */,
  "mfcc0" REAL /* First MFCC coefficient */,
  "mfcc1" REAL /* Second MFCC coefficient */,
  "mfcc2" REAL /* Third MFCC coefficient */,
  "mfcc3" REAL /* Fourth MFCC coefficient */,
  "mfcc4" REAL /* Fifth MFCC coefficient */,
  "spectral_centroid" REAL /* Spectral centroid of the track */,
  "spectral_bandwidth" REAL /* Spectral bandwidth of the track */,
  "spectral_rolloff" REAL /* Spectral rolloff of the track */,
  "zero_crossing_rate" REAL /* Zero crossing rate of the track */,
  "beats_per_minute" REAL /* Beats per minute of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album containing the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the track */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Influences of the artist */,
  "similar_artists" TEXT /* Similar artists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenres" TEXT /* Subgenres of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's preferred music genre */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (free or premium) */,
  "streaming_history" TEXT /* Streaming history of the user */,
  "playlists" TEXT /* Playlists created by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the preference */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that is preferred */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the track */,
  "last_listened_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last listened to the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is receiving the recommendation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "tracks" TEXT /* Tracks included in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who streamed the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that was streamed */,
  "streaming_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was streamed */,
  "streaming_duration" REAL /* Duration of the streaming activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track request entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the request */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that was requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_requests_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is following the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the artist */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_ratings_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
